lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਘੜਿ ਭੰਨਿ ਸਵਾਰਹਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਸੁਹਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੮॥੫॥੬॥
lines.translit: toon aape hee gharr bhan savaareh naanak naam suhaavaniaa |8|5|6|
lines.english: You Yourself create, destroy and adorn. O Nanak, we are adorned and embellished with the Naam. ||8||5||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਘਟ ਆਪੇ ਭੋਗਣਹਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: sabh ghatt aape bhoganahaaraa |
lines.english: He is the Enjoyer of all hearts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਝ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: maajh mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Maajh, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਮੇਰਾ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਸਹਜੇ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad meraa har prabh dhiaaeeai sahaje sach samaavaniaa |1|
lines.english: Meditating on my Lord God, through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, I am intuitively absorbed in the Truth. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਲਖੁ ਵਰਤੈ ਅਗਮ ਅਪਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: alakh varatai agam apaaraa |
lines.english: The Invisible, Inaccessible and Infinite is pervading everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੁ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਵਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau vaaree jeeo vaaree gurasabad man vasaavaniaa |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, my soul is a sacrifice, to those who implant the Word of the Guru's Shabad in their minds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੁ ਸੂਝੈ ਤਾ ਮਨ ਸਿਉ ਲੂਝੈ ਮਨਸਾ ਮਾਰਿ ਸਮਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sabad soojhai taa man siau loojhai manasaa maar samaavaniaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: When someone understands the Shabad, then he wrestles with his own mind; subduing his desires, he merges with the Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਅੰਧੇ ਸੁਧਿ ਨ ਸਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh andhe sudh na saaraa |
lines.english: The blind, self-willed manmukhs do not understand or appreciate this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਚ ਦੂਤ ਮੁਹਹਿ ਸੰਸਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: panch doot muheh sansaaraa |
lines.english: The five enemies are plundering the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੁ ਅਪਣਾ ਘਰੁ ਰਾਖੈ ਪੰਚ ਦੂਤ ਸਬਦਿ ਪਚਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: guramukh hovai su apanaa ghar raakhai panch doot sabad pachaavaniaa |2|
lines.english: Those who become Gurmukh-their houses are protected. The five enemies are destroyed by the Shabad. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਦਾ ਸਚੈ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: eik guramukh sadaa sachai rang raate |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs are forever imbued with love for the True One.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਸਚੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਿ ਸੋਭਾ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: mil preetam sache gun gaaveh har dar sobhaa paavaniaa |3|
lines.english: Meeting with their Beloved, they sing the Glorious Praises of the True one; they are honored in the Court of the Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜੇ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸੇਵਹਿ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਮਾਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: sahaje prabh seveh anadin maate |
lines.english: They serve God with intuitive ease. Night and day, they are intoxicated with His Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਬਿਧਾ ਦੂਜਾ ਤ੍ਰਿਬਿਧਿ ਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: dubidhaa doojaa tribidh maaeaa |
lines.english: second, the sense of duality; third, the three-phased Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਉਥੀ ਪਉੜੀ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਊਚੀ ਸਚੋ ਸਚੁ ਕਮਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: chauthee paurree guramukh aoochee sacho sach kamaavaniaa |4|
lines.english: The fourth state, the highest, is obtained by the Gurmukh, who practices Truth, and only Truth. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕਮ ਏਕੈ ਆਪੁ ਉਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: ekam ekai aap upaaeaa |
lines.english: First, the One created Himself;

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕਰਣੀ ਸਚੇ ਸੇਵਹਿ ਸਾਚੇ ਜਾਇ ਸਮਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: guramukh karanee sache seveh saache jaae samaavaniaa |5|
lines.english: The life-style of the Gurmukh is to serve the True Lord. He goes and blends with the True Lord. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਸਚੁ ਜਾਤਾ ਸੋ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: jin sach jaataa so sehaj samaavai |
lines.english: Those who know the Truth merge in intuitive peace and poise.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਹੈ ਸਚਾ ਜੇ ਸਚੇ ਭਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: sabh hai sachaa je sache bhaavai |
lines.english: Everything which is pleasing to the True Lord is true.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜੈ ਲਾਗਿ ਜਗੁ ਖਪਿ ਖਪਿ ਮੂਆ ॥
lines.translit: doojai laag jag khap khap mooaa |
lines.english: Attached to duality, the world is distracted and distressed to death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੇ ਬਾਝਹੁ ਕੋ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਦੂਆ ॥
lines.translit: sache baajhahu ko avar na dooaa |
lines.english: Without the True One, there is no other at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੁ ਏਕੋ ਜਾਣੈ ਏਕੋ ਸੇਵਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: guramukh hovai su eko jaanai eko sev sukh paavaniaa |6|
lines.english: One who becomes Gurmukh knows only the One. Serving the One, peace is obtained. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਸਭਿ ਸਰਣਿ ਤੁਮਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: jeea jant sabh saran tumaaree |
lines.english: All beings and creatures are in the Protection of Your Sanctuary.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਧਰਿ ਦੇਖਹਿ ਕਚੀ ਪਕੀ ਸਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: aape dhar dekheh kachee pakee saaree |
lines.english: You place the chessmen on the board; You see the imperfect and the perfect as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲਹਿ ਵੇਖਹਿ ਹਦੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: toon aape meleh vekheh hadoor |
lines.english: You Yourself unite, and You see Yourself close at hand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਆਪੇ ਕਾਰ ਕਰਾਏ ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: anadin aape kaar karaae aape mel milaavaniaa |7|
lines.english: Night and day, You cause people to act; You unite them in Union with Yourself. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਵਰਤੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸੋਝੀ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੮॥੬॥੭॥
lines.translit: naanak aape aap varatai guramukh sojhee paavaniaa |8|6|7|
lines.english: O Nanak, God Himself is pervading and permeating everywhere; only the Gurmukhs understand this. ||8||6||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਆਪਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਭਰਪੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: sabh meh aap rahiaa bharapoor |
lines.english: You Yourself are totally pervading amongst all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਬਾਣੀ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਮੀਠੀ ॥
lines.translit: amrit baanee gur kee meetthee |
lines.english: The Nectar of the Guru's Bani is very sweet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਝ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: maajh mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Maajh, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਵਿਰਲੈ ਕਿਨੈ ਚਖਿ ਡੀਠੀ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh viralai kinai chakh ddeetthee |
lines.english: Rare are the Gurmukhs who see and taste it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਪਰਗਾਸੁ ਮਹਾ ਰਸੁ ਪੀਵੈ ਦਰਿ ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦੁ ਵਜਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: antar paragaas mahaa ras peevai dar sachai sabad vajaavaniaa |1|
lines.english: The Divine Light dawns within, and the supreme essence is found. In the True Court, the Word of the Shabad vibrates. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਗੁਰ ਚਰਣੀ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਵਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau vaaree jeeo vaaree gur charanee chit laavaniaa |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, my soul is a sacrifice, to those who focus their consciousness on the Guru's Feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਹੈ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਸਰੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਮਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਮੈਲੁ ਚੁਕਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: satigur hai amrit sar saachaa man naavai mail chukaavaniaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The True Guru is the True Pool of Nectar; bathing in it, the mind is washed clean of all filth. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰਾ ਸਚੇ ਕਿਨੈ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: teraa sache kinai ant na paaeaa |
lines.english: Your limits, O True Lord, are not known to anyone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦਿ ਕਿਨੈ ਵਿਰਲੈ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaad kinai viralai chit laaeaa |
lines.english: Rare are those who, by Guru's Grace, focus their consciousness on You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਸਾਲਾਹਿ ਨ ਰਜਾ ਕਬਹੂੰ ਸਚੇ ਨਾਵੈ ਕੀ ਭੁਖ ਲਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tudh saalaeh na rajaa kabahoon sache naavai kee bhukh laavaniaa |2|
lines.english: Praising You, I am never satisfied; such is the hunger I feel for the True Name. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੋ ਵੇਖਾ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਬੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: eko vekhaa avar na beea |
lines.english: I see only the One, and no other.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਤਿਖਾ ਨਿਵਾਰੀ ਸਹਜੇ ਸੂਖਿ ਸਮਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad tikhaa nivaaree sahaje sookh samaavaniaa |3|
lines.english: My thirst is quenched by the Word of the Guru's Shabad; I am absorbed in intuitive peace and poise. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee amrit peea |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, I drink in the Ambrosial Nectar.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖੁ ਅੰਧਾ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਲਾਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh andhaa doojai bhaae laagai |
lines.english: the blind self-willed manmukhs are attached to the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਤਨੁ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਪਲਰਿ ਤਿਆਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: ratan padaarath palar tiaagai |
lines.english: The Priceless Jewel is discarded like straw;

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪਨੀ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਸੋਈ ਜਨੁ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: apanee kirapaa kare soee jan paae |
lines.english: Those who are blessed with His Mercy find the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: gur kaa sabad man vasaae |
lines.english: The Word of the Guru's Shabad abides in the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਬੀਜੈ ਸੋਈ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਏ ਸੁਪਨੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਨ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: jo beejai soee fal paae supanai sukh na paavaniaa |4|
lines.english: As they plant, so do they harvest. They shall not obtain peace, even in their dreams. ||4||
